name: pow-poll-clickup
description: Polls ClickUp every 15 min for Protect Our Winters tasks in 'Ready to Build' or 'Ready to Deploy' and runs the matching pipeline stage
notes: Primary trigger for the pipeline. Runs nightly at 6am UTC (≈1am EST / 10pm PST previous day). Drains the FULL queue in one run: all Ready-to-Build tasks first (oldest first), then all Ready-to-Deploy tasks. Partial failures don't abort the batch — a failed build moves on to the next task. ClickUp and Slack interactions use MCP connectors (not curl) — Anthropic's security proxy blocks direct api.clickup.com and intermittently hooks.slack.com, so the environment MUST have ClickUp and Slack connectors attached. Auth is handled by the connectors — no CLICKUP_API_KEY or SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL needed. RESIN_ALLOW_PROD_DEPLOY=1 required because the deploy phase inlines /deploy-prod, which runs prod-deploy commands gated by block-sf-data-changes.sh. Budget: 1 routine run per day per client (fits within Max-plan 15/day with room for manual debug runs).
